questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to run event-driven functions without servers?
questions.explanation: Lambda executes code in response to events.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to create REST APIs for microservices?
questions.explanation: API Gateway manages HTTP APIs and integrations.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to store objects for serverless web assets?

options.text: Amazon EFS for static sites only

questions.explanation: S3 hosts static assets and user uploads.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to send asynchronous messages between services?
questions.explanation: SQS decouples producers and consumers.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to fan out events to multiple subscribers?
questions.explanation: SNS is a pub/sub messaging service.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to orchestrate multi-step serverless workflows?
questions.explanation: Step Functions coordinates Lambda and other services.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to authenticate users for web and mobile apps?
questions.explanation: Cognito provides user pools and identity pools.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to cache DynamoDB reads for lower latency?

options.text: Amazon ElastiCache for all DynamoDB writes

questions.explanation: DAX is an in-memory cache for DynamoDB.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to run containers without managing EC2 for tasks?

options.text: Amazon Lightsail only for K8s control plane

questions.explanation: Fargate runs containers serverlessly.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to version and deploy application packages?
questions.explanation: CodeDeploy automates deployments to compute.

questions.explanation: Use official AWS exam guides, Skill Builder, and AWS documentation—not real exam content.
